title: Senthil Balaji wins Coimbatore South by just 1,991 votes; TVK gives tough fight
summary: DMK's V. Senthil Balaji scraped through to victory in Coimbatore South by a wafer-thin 1,991 votes after a TVK surge that kept the result on a knife-edge until the 24th counting round.

title: TVK sweeps Coimbatore North, Kavundampalayam, Singanallur, Kinathukadavu, Mettuppalayam, Sulur
summary: TVK posted a near-clean sweep across the rest of urban and peri-urban Coimbatore, winning North, Kavundampalayam, Singanallur, Kinathukadavu, Mettuppalayam and Sulur on counting day.

title: Kavundampalayam's Kanimozhi Santhosh (TVK) posts highest margin (42,140) in district
summary: Kavundampalayam's TVK winner Kanimozhi Santhosh recorded the highest victory margin in the district at 42,140 votes, eclipsing every other Coimbatore constituency.

title: Pollachi upset: DMK's K. Nithyanandhan unseats AIADMK veteran
summary: Pollachi delivered the day's biggest upset as DMK's K. Nithyanandhan unseated the AIADMK incumbent, breaking what had been a near-decade-long hold on the constituency.

title: Coimbatore North winner V. Sampathkumar visits Ukkadam, promises bus port upgrade
summary: Coimbatore North's TVK MLA V. Sampathkumar visited Ukkadam on May 5 and committed to a full upgrade of the bus port, pitching it as a regional mobility hub.

title: Singanallur TVK's K.S. Sri Giri Prasath to take up IT corridor development
summary: Singanallur's K.S. Sri Giri Prasath has identified IT corridor expansion along the Avinashi Road belt as the centrepiece of his constituency development agenda.

title: Mettuppalayam TVK's Sunil Anand meets tea estate workers, assures minimum wage revision
summary: Mettuppalayam's Sunil Anand met tea estate workers on May 5 and assured he would push for a fresh minimum wage revision in the next state labour advisory board meeting.

title: Sulur TVK's NM. Sukumar promises expansion of Sulur airport
summary: Sulur's TVK MLA NM. Sukumar said expansion of the Sulur airport civilian terminal would be his constituency-level priority, with a representation to the Centre planned within a month.

title: Kinathukadavu TVK's Vignesh K: youth wing played key role in victory
summary: Kinathukadavu's first-time MLA Vignesh K credited the party youth wing for the win, saying the door-to-door campaign by young volunteers had decisively shifted the verdict.

title: AIADMK accepts defeat in 6 seats, says 'will rebuild from grassroots'
summary: Coimbatore AIADMK has accepted defeat in six of the ten constituencies and said the focus would now be on grassroots rebuilding ahead of the 2027 local body polls.

title: Coimbatore City Corporation to table Rs 4,500 crore budget tomorrow
summary: Coimbatore City Corporation will table a Rs 4,500 crore annual budget on May 6, with major outlays for stormwater drainage, road widening and lakebed restoration.

title: Isha Foundation welcomes new MLAs, invites them for Cauvery Calling review
summary: The Isha Foundation has welcomed the new Coimbatore MLAs and invited them for a structured review of the Cauvery Calling initiative's plantation milestones.

title: G.D. Naidu Industrial Park expansion hinges on new government support
summary: Promoters of the proposed G.D. Naidu Industrial Park said the project's next phase now hinges on land conversion approvals and capital subsidy from the incoming state government.

title: Pollachi coconut market sees price dip; traders seek immediate intervention
summary: Pollachi mandi traders flagged a sharp price dip on May 5 and sought immediate state intervention through a procurement floor and freight subsidy for inter-state movement.

title: Coimbatore Metro: Public consultation dates announced for Avinashi Road alignment
summary: Coimbatore Metro Rail has announced public consultation dates for the Avinashi Road alignment, with hearings scheduled across all assembly segments along the proposed corridor.
